query: How frequently does the US CPSC publish computer-related recalls? Looking at CPSC.gov and SaferProducts.gov recall history for the category 'computers' - approximately how many recalls per year, and are there typically gaps of 2 months with no computer recalls? List recent computer-related recalls in 2024, 2025 and 2026 with dates (including laptops, power supplies, monitors, batteries, chargers).
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

## Summary

**CPSC does not maintain a discrete "Computers" recall category** — a direct API query for `ProductType=Computers` returns zero results. Computer-related recalls are spread across descriptors like *laptop*, *charger*, *power bank*, *AC adapter*, and *power supply*, and lithium-ion power banks dominate the space.

**Frequency depends heavily on definition:**
- **Narrow** (laptops, laptop adapters, computer PSUs): ~**1–2 per year**. Gaps of 2+ months — even a year or more — with NO strictly-computer recall are **the norm**.
- **Broad** (including power banks, chargers, adapters): ~**8–12 per year, roughly one per month**. Under this definition, 2-month gaps are relatively uncommon.

**On your specific 2-month-gap question:** Yes for strictly-computer recalls; but if you include the power-bank/charger accessory ecosystem, recalls occur nearly monthly.

**Notable recent recalls with dates:**
- **2024-02-21** — Dynabook/Toshiba laptop AC adapters (15.5M units) — the main laptop-hardware recall
- **2026-04-16** — Apex/Manik ATX computer power supplies — the clearest true "computer" recall
- Plus ~30+ power bank/charger recalls (Anker, Belkin, ESR, iWALK, Casely, IKEA, Baseus, INIU, HTRC, etc.)

**On the sub-categories you named:**
- **Laptops:** No recalls of laptop units themselves (only AC adapters)
- **Monitors:** No computer-display recalls found (a "monitor" query returned only a *baby* monitor)
- **Power supplies:** Apex/Manik ATX (Apr 2026)
- **Batteries/chargers:** Dominate the list, overwhelmingly for fire/burn hazards

The full report, structured data points, and sourced recall list have been captured in the structured output.

sources.title: CPSC SaferProducts REST API - power bank recalls
sources.snippet: 17 power bank recalls 2024-2026 including Anker, Belkin, ESR, iWALK, Casely, IKEA, Baseus.

sources.title: CPSC SaferProducts REST API - charger recalls
sources.snippet: 9 charger recalls 2024-2026 including HTRC, Baseus, Belkin, myCharge, IKEA USB chargers.

sources.title: Dynabook Americas Recalls 15.5 Million Toshiba Laptop AC Adapters
sources.snippet: Recall dated 2024-02-21 for Toshiba laptop AC adapters, burn and fire hazards.

sources.title: Apex Gaming PCs Recalls Manik and Apex ATX Computer Power Supplies
sources.snippet: Recall dated 2026-04-16 for ATX computer PSUs, electrical shock/electrocution hazards.

sources.title: Lenovo Recalls USB-C Laptop Power Banks Due to Fire Hazard
sources.snippet: Recall announced 2023-11-22; model PBLG2W/part 40ALLG2WW; ~2,850 US units.

sources.title: More than One Million Anker Power Banks Recalled
CPSC SaferProducts REST API - monitor recalls
sources.snippet: Only result was Babysense Max View baby monitors (2026-02-26); no computer displays.

data_points.metric: Broad computer-accessory recalls per year (power banks/chargers/adapters)
